title: iPhone 18 to get a big RAM upgrade as Apple doubles down on AI: Report
snippet: Apple is set to launch the iPhone 18 and iPhone 18e next spring with 9GB and the A20 chipset. The iPhone 18 lineup could also include improved AI features and brighter display, and better optics.

title: India's robotics funding doubles in 2026 first-half, but scale seems far away
snippet: India's robotics sector continues to lag its global peers. In 2025, Indian robotics startups raised less than 1% of the capital secured by US robotics startups and about 2% of that raised in China, according to Tracxn.

title: iPhone Ultra launch back on track after Apple fixes critical foldable issue: Report
snippet: Apple's foldable iPhone is set for a September launch after resolving hinge issues, as per a new report

title: Apple price hike: Check updated prices of MacBook Neo, Mac mini M4, iPads and HomePod
snippet: Apple has raised prices for its MacBooks, iPads, and other products in India due to increasing memory chip costs.&nbsp;

title: Apple raises MacBook and iPad prices amid memory chip crunch — Check new prices here
snippet: Memory chip makers such as Micron have, in recent months, prioritised orders from AI chipmakers like Nvidia, helping them earn record profits but leaving little supply for electronics makers that have been forced to increase prices.

title: Google alerted users seconds before Venezuela's earthquake. Here's how Android phones detect tremors
snippet: As two powerful earthquakes struck Venezuela within minutes of each other, several Android users reported receiving Google earthquake alerts before the tremors reached them. The warnings were made possible by Google's Android Earthquake Alerts System.

title: OnePlus Nord Buds 4 launched in India with 52dB ANC, 54-hour battery life: Check price and features
snippet: OnePlus has launched the Nord Buds 4 in India at  ₹3,299 and a special price of  ₹3,099. They come with features like 52dB active noise cancellation, Bluetooth 6.1, and 54 hours of battery life.&nbsp;

title: iOS 27 Camera app gets new Siri mode: Here's everything it can do
snippet: Apple has brought Siri mode in the Camera app with latest iOS 27 update which allows users to access AI features for object recognition and expense splitting.&nbsp;

title: Nutanix says software companies will fail in GenAI era only if they’re not critical
snippet: As generative AI reshapes software, Nutanix's CEO emphasizes the company's integral role in technology infrastructure. Despite recent declines in market value, Nutanix remains confident in its growth potential, focusing on essential software that cannot be easily replaced by automation.

title: Heat waves mess with your brain. Scientists are trying to figure out why.
snippet: It’s been hot in London this week. Really hot. A dangerous heat wave has hit Western Europe. Yesterday, the UK recorded its highest ever June temperature at 36.1 °C (about 97 °F). title: IBM has unveiled chip technology that could help extend Moore’s Law another decade
snippet: IBM has built a new prototype chip with around 100 billion transistors on an area the size of a fingernail, which is twice the density of the company’s previous state-of-the-art technology announced in 2021. title: Europe’s extreme heat is shutting down power plants
snippet: Europe is in the middle of a record-breaking heat wave, and the grid is being pushed to its limits as people turn to fans and air-conditioning to try to stay cool.
